_schema.purpose: wq-073 — single source-of-truth for editorial methodology constants currently hardcoded across HTML pages. HTML pages fetch this file and interpolate into [data-method] spans at render time.
_schema.principle: If a value appears in narrative text but represents an editorial methodology constant (a rate, percentage, or industry-figure that would change as data updates), it lives here.
_schema.fetch_pattern: fetch('data/methodology_constants.json').then(r => r.json()).then(c => { document.querySelectorAll('[data-method]').forEach(el => { const path = el.dataset.method; const v = path.split('.').reduce((o,k) => o && o[k], c); if (v != null) el.textContent = v; }); })

headline._doc: $260B/yr industry investment ($711M/day; $15 per $1 of revenue) per assumptions-audit.md §6 'Annual Investment (capex + VC subsidy) ~$260B'. The ~$15:$1 ratio = $260B annual investment / ~$17B annual customer revenue (cumulative-equivalent at run rate). Pre-formatted *_label variants for direct innerHTML injection.

tier_definitions._doc: Tier 1B 'Corroborated' source-credibility threshold: independent reporting sources agreeing within ~15% per methodology.html §3.1 / source credibility scoring. See model-assumptions.md §3.

compute_revenue._doc: wq-087 D6 verification gate, retained under wq-089. Records principal/agent treatment for the four hyperscaler AI reseller arrangements. The aggregator (scripts/derive_compute_revenue.py) refuses to run if any treatment shifts to 'agent'. Re-verify each cycle when 10-Ks refile.
compute_revenue.bucket_model_doc: wq-089 introduced three-bucket decomposition (frontier-lab compute / non-frontier workload / token-API resale). Pass-through applies to bucket 3 only. Copilot scoped OUT. See data/compute_disclosures.json:_schema and methodology.html §three-bucket-model.

msft_azure_openai_service.basis: MSFT FY25 10-K Note 1 (cloud services consumption-based revenue + cost of revenue includes royalties — OpenAI rev-share is a royalty/COGS, not a revenue offset).

amzn_aws_bedrock.basis: AMZN FY25 10-K Note 1 (Marketplace explicitly carved out as agent — 'we are not the seller of record'; AWS is NOT in that carve-out, so principal).

googl_vertex_partner_models.basis: GOOGL FY25 10-K Note 1 (principal/agent test invoked only for Google Network ad properties; Cloud is consumption-based fees with content licensing as cost of revenue — gross treatment).

orcl_oci_partner_workloads.basis: ORCL FY25 10-K Note 1 (cloud services revenue recognized over contractual period or as consumed; no marketplace carve-out).

headline.annual_ai_investment_usd_b.source: assumptions-audit.md §6 'Annual Investment (capex + VC subsidy) ~$260B | Ticks the clock'

headline.investment_to_revenue_ratio.source: Editorial framing per AI Ledger 'follow the dollar' narrative; matches $260B annual investment / ~$17B run-rate customer revenue.
